description: A colorful Tailwind-oriented design system for SMB shared-mailbox automation, inspired by Notion's clarity and Stripe's precision.

sections.title: Design Philosophy
sections.description: Core experience principles expressed as product UI cards.

examples.title: Principle cards
examples.description: Principles use restrained surfaces with colorful accents only where workflow meaning exists.

cards.title: Context before automation
cards.text: Show the message, sender, workflow, and next action before running rules.
cards.class: rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-xs

cards.title: Color means workflow state
cards.text: Queue health, urgency, ownership, and automation status receive color before decoration does.
cards.class: rounded-xl border border-primary bg-primary/10 p-4 shadow-xs

sections.title: Color System
sections.description: Prism Light colors keep mailbox surfaces calm while making automation status visible.

examples.title: Brand and semantic swatches
examples.description: Primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors map to action and workflow meaning.

sections.title: Typography
sections.description: Inter provides crisp scanning for inbox rows, setup flows, and automation explanations.

examples.title: Type scale
examples.description: Large headings are reserved for setup and empty states; app surfaces use compact body text.

samples.label: Body
samples.text: Route urgent messages, draft replies, and keep owners accountable.

sections.title: Layout and Spacing
sections.description: A 0.25rem base creates predictable density across inbox rows and automation review screens.

examples.title: Spacing rhythm
examples.description: The working rhythm centers around token 3 and token 4.

sections.title: Border Radius
sections.description: Soft but restrained radius makes the system approachable without losing precision.

examples.title: Radius scale in use
examples.description: Controls use md, cards use lg, and pills use full radius.

cards.title: Pill radius
cards.text: Full radius is reserved for badges and filters.
cards.class: rounded-full border border-primary bg-primary/10 p-4 text-primary

sections.title: Shadows and Elevation
sections.description: Depth is border-first, with shadows reserved for floating surfaces.

examples.title: Elevation stack
examples.description: Cards stay quiet, while popovers and modals receive stronger depth.

cards.title: Default card
cards.class: rounded-lg border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-none

cards.title: Popover
cards.text: Medium shadow signals a floating menu.
cards.class: rounded-lg border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-md

cards.title: Modal
cards.class: rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-lg

sections.title: Component States
sections.description: States distinguish availability, selection, validation, and automation progress.

examples.title: Action states
examples.description: Primary action states retain layout width and visible focus treatment.

states.label: Default
states.class: rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-content

states.label: Hover
states.class: rounded-md bg-primary/90 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-content

states.label: Focused
states.class: rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-content ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2

states.label: Disabled
states.class: cursor-not-allowed rounded-md bg-primary/45 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-content/70

sections.title: Forms and Selection Controls
sections.description: Forms keep labels visible and place recovery close to the field.

examples.title: Mailbox settings form
examples.description: Fields, helper text, and toggles use the shared control rhythm.

sections.title: Buttons
sections.description: Buttons communicate action priority and support the canonical icon-size rows.

examples.title: Button variants
examples.description: Primary is reserved for the recommended next action.

buttons.label: Automate
buttons.class: rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-content shadow-xs

buttons.label: Assign
buttons.class: rounded-md bg-secondary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-secondary-content shadow-xs

buttons.label: Preview
buttons.class: rounded-md border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content

buttons.label: Delete
buttons.class: rounded-md bg-error px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-error-content

sections.title: Navigation
sections.description: Navigation preserves queue orientation without competing with message content.

examples.title: Sidebar items
examples.description: Counts stay trailing and current state uses a primary tint.

items.label: Inbox
items.class: flex h-10 items-center rounded-lg bg-primary/10 px-3 text-sm font-medium text-primary

items.label: Review
items.class: flex h-10 items-center rounded-lg px-3 text-sm font-medium text-base-content/75 hover:bg-base-200

items.label: Automations
items.class: flex h-10 items-center rounded-lg px-3 text-sm font-medium text-base-content/75 hover:bg-base-200

sections.title: Tables and Data Display
sections.description: Tables keep sender, status, owner, and SLA visible for fast queue scanning.

examples.title: Mailbox queue table
examples.description: Status badges and SLA values remain visible at default density.

sections.title: Feedback and Alerts
sections.description: Feedback appears at the scope of the event and stays actionable.

examples.title: Scoped alerts
examples.description: Errors stay until resolved; success can confirm and disappear.

alerts.title: Rule ready to publish
alerts.text: Review routing conditions before enabling automation.
alerts.class: rounded-lg border border-info bg-info/10 p-4 text-info-content

alerts.title: SLA risk detected
alerts.text: Eight messages need owner review within one hour.
alerts.class: rounded-lg border border-warning bg-warning/15 p-4 text-warning-content

alerts.title: Sync failed
alerts.text: Reconnect the mailbox before running this workflow again.
alerts.class: rounded-lg border border-error bg-error/10 p-4 text-error
